summary: Live PR inventory shard classified from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected because the job says this is not a dedupe cluster. No security-sensitive items were detected. Close, merge, fix, and raise_pr paths are disabled by the job/fix-artifact gates, so each open PR is kept open with its own independent classification and blocker evidence.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent PR needing proof and maintainer/technical review; no safe close, merge, or fix action is permitted.
Keep open as an independent draft PR needing real behavior proof; no closure or repair path is permitted by this job.
Keep open as an independent maintainer-owned PR awaiting maintainer look; green checks and focused bug-fix judgment are human-gated in this job.
Keep open as an independent PR with compatibility/auth-provider risk and unresolved review/proof blockers.
Keep open as an independent docs/scripts PR with supplied proof but outstanding requested changes and a related still-open issue.
